Give some of them stats so they aren't paper anymore, even an old War team should mostly keep up with a newer Crucible team in War. Make some old mode-locked abilities work everywhere, make Invaders a War Defense team since they haven't been in raids for years. Adding smaller reworks alongside new teams would keep the game fresh. I know Scopely will never do this because they want you to buy new toons on release, and they'll keep power-creeping stuff, but this wouldn't cut into sales. It would make the meta less stale and more F2P-friendly. I'd love a buff to Red Hulk, his damage and health feel pitiful. I want constant reworks but I know it'll never happen.
label: monetization_critique
notes: HARD CASE candidate: long multi-purpose post; deletion test -> monetization
